title: bupleurum andhricum
intro: Bupleurum andhricum, also known as Himalayan bupleurum, is a plant species in the genus Bupleurum, characterized by its yellowish-white flowers and medicinal properties. It is traditionally used in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is believed to have anti-inflammatory and antiviral properties, helping to reduce fever and alleviate symptoms of respiratory and gastrointestinal disorders. The health benefits of Bupleurum andhricum include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce stress and anxiety, and improve digestion. Bupleurum andhricum can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or dried extract, and is often combined with other herbs in traditional Chinese medicine formulas.
